Title: Establishes a task force to study and make recommendations on chronic absenteeism at public schools in the state of New York
Summary: Establishes a task force to study and make recommendations on chronic absenteeism at public schools in the state of New York; establishes reporting requirements.
ActClause: AN ACT establishing a task force to study and make recommendations on chronic absenteeism at public schools in the state of New York; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon the expiration thereof
